lastItems.title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
Moonlake: Causal World Models should be Multimodal, Interactive, and Efficient — with Chris Manning and Fan-yun Sun
lastItems.summary: We cap out our World Models coverage with one of the most exciting new approaches - long running, multiplayer, interactive world models built with agents bootstrapped from game engines!

lastItems.title: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
lastItems.summary: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.
